markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a content partner for technical SEO/AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Jama needs a partner for technical SEO/AEO content (for systems engineers) to gain LLM visibility and scale beyond its current 6–8 blogs/quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An end-to-end service providing daily content creation, strategy, and execution. It uses a hybrid AI/human workflow to scale quality and solve for the long tail of AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** GrowthX provides full execution, unlike platforms (e.g., Profound) that only offer frameworks. Its technical expertise is proven by work for clients like Abnormal Security and Augment Code.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Jama will share content examples for a fit assessment, aiming to decide by Christmas for a January/February 2025 start.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

## Topics

### Jama's Content Needs

  - [**Primary Goal:** Content creation for SEO and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) to increase visibility in LLM overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**Core Challenge:** Scaling quality technical content for a discerning audience (systems engineers) is difficult and time-consuming (6–12 month writer training).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Current Output:** 6–8 blogs per quarter, plus other collateral.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Desired Partner Profile:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [Specialized expertise for immediate impact.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [Scalability to increase content volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [Full execution capabilities (strategy → CMS publishing).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### GrowthX's Service Model

  - [**End-to-End Partnership:** Manages the full content lifecycle: strategy, creation, execution, and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Execution:** Publishes daily to solve for the long tail of AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Team as an Extension:** Frees up internal resources for pillar content (e.g., white papers).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Technical Expertise:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Team:** Led by Matthew Panzarino (ex-TechCrunch EIC); client-facing staff have deep SEO/content backgrounds.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - [**Process:** Uses a hybrid AI/human workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
          - [**AI:** Generates briefs and drafts using client artifacts (personas, brand guides).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
          - [**Human:** Editors provide commands and make final optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
      - [**Proof:** Work for technical clients like Abnormal Security (glossary), Augment Code (\~200 guides), and Ramp (900 pages).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)

### Engagement Structure & Logistics

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks)**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [**Goal:** Validate fit and quality before a long-term commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** Keyword analysis, content roadmap, and 5–10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Weekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Decision Point:** Jama can opt out at the end of this phase.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12 months)**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [**Goal:** Execute the content roadmap at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Bi-weekly meetings to review performance and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Looker dashboard for metrics; Scrunch (or GrowthX's upcoming platform) for LLM prompt tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [**Execution Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**CMS Publishing:** GrowthX handles publishing to WordPress at no extra cost, provided a template exists.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [**Pricing:** Flat fee for Phase 1, then a monthly fee for Phase 2. Limited negotiation room due to high demand.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Client Focus:** GrowthX limits kickoffs to two per week to ensure dedicated attention and high churn retention.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fani:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Share 3–5 content examples representing the desired quality and style.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call to discuss procurement and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [Send GrowthX resources (case studies, process overview).](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [**Jama Decision:** By Christmas 2024.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
      - [**Project Start:** January/February 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/Z_6NHvbzdrzYYczsJhxV-nTBsC6hRisc?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
